task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Map' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' field at the very top should be set to 'Map'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Title' field should contain exactly 'Washington West, DC-MD-VA'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Creator and their Role are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, there should be a creator entry with the role dropdown set to 'Cartographer' and the name field containing 'U.S. Geological Survey' (likely entered as a single-field institutional author).

task_completion.description: Verify the Date and Scale fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Date' field should show '2016' and the 'Scale' field should show '1:24000' or '1:24,000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Series Title field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Series Title' field should contain '7.5 Minute Series'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Publisher and Place fields are correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Publisher' field should contain 'U.S. Geological Survey' and the 'Place' field should contain 'Reston, VA'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Juris-M GUI to create the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application interface being actively used (e.g., clicking the 'New Item' button, typing into the info pane), rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The reference was actually added to the Juris-M library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The new 'Washington West, DC-MD-VA' map entry should be visible in the middle pane (the library item list) of the Juris-M window.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected values into a text editor or unrelated application.
integrity.visual_evidence: All data entry must be visible within the specific fields of the Juris-M right-hand info pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target item type must be 'Map'. The title is 'Washington West, DC-MD-VA'. The date is '2016'. The scale is '1:24000' or '1:24,000'. The series title is '7.5 Minute Series'. The publisher is 'U.S. Geological Survey'. The place is 'Reston, VA'. The creator is 'U.S. Geological Survey' with the specific role 'Cartographer'.
